title: Place
description: A geographic anchor in the gazetteer. Usually ATEMPORAL — a place persists across history. Events and features REFERENCE places by id. Reuse external gazetteer IDs; do not reinvent place identity.

alt_names.description: Variant/historical/transliterated spellings for SEARCH, e.g. ['Madinah','Medina','Yathrib','المدينة']. Fed into the offline search index.

geometry.description: Usually a Point; Polygon for regions.

gazetteer_ids.description: External stable IDs (Linked Places). Reuse, don't reinvent.

modern_name.description: Present-day name if different (e.g. historical Yathrib -> Medina).
